Releases.Name: Stranger Than Heaven
Releases.PlatformsFull: Xbox Series X|S, PC (Microsoft Windows), PlayStation 5
Releases.Summary: Stranger Than Heaven is an upcoming action-adventure game developed by Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio and published by Sega. The game follows a multi-decade story across five eras and five cities, centered on men searching for a place to belong. It combines close-quarters action with narrative elements, historical urban settings, and activities connected to music and performance.
Releases.SimilarGames: The Sinking City · The Elder Scrolls VI · The Black Death · Borderlands 3 · Forgotton Anne · Force of Nature

Releases.Name: Wingspan: Bird Pack - Birds of the U.S.A.
One Billion Ducks
Releases.Summary: An incremental journey about duck hunting with your canine companions. Shoot rare ducks, sell them, upgrade your abilities, and collect one billion ducks to combat world hunger!
Releases.SimilarGames: Rico · Cooking Simulator · Bronze Age · Ashi Wash · Another Brick in the Mall · Supreme Ruler Ultimate

Releases.Name: Cytokine Storm
Releases.Summary: Cytokine Storm is a retro survival horror set inside a coma patient's body. Battle parasites, viruses, and a defective immune system to wake yourself up. Explore a surreal biological world where you must use your wits, weapons, and unique costumes to survive grotesque locations and puzzles.
Releases.SimilarGames: Apsulov: End of Gods · Don't Knock Twice · Pacify · Darq · Dream Alone · The Dark Occult

Releases.Name: Polymorphite
Releases.Summary: Polymorphite is a rhythm-adventure hybrid game that fuses keyboard-and-mouse rhythm dodging gameplay with a deep narrative following three concurrent Tokyo residents as a bizarre serial murder case unravels the fabric of reality; and the question of what it means to be “human” becomes more important than ever before.
Releases.SimilarGames: Quern: Undying Thoughts · Omensight · Unforeseen Incidents · Rusty Lake Hotel · The Key to Home · Apsulov: End of Gods

Releases.Name: Cogito: Requiem
Releases.Summary:
Cogito: Requiem is a 2D action game where you dash freely through a harmony of music and sound effects.

The setting: a world where humanity has migrated into the digital realm and vanished, leaving behind only the SI—artificial intelligences who once had humans as their masters. As Cogito, you race through this world where their remnants linger, set on "ending" the SI that have fallen into error.

Releases.Name: Wandering Sword
Releases.Summary:
The hit pixel-art RPG set in the world of Chinese martial arts is finally coming to PlayStation!
Play as a young swordsman gravely injured after being caught in a violent conflict.
Having narrowly escaped death, you set out on a journey to master the martial arts and fulfill your destiny as a true hero in a vast wuxia world.
Includes Original DLC
All DLC released on other platforms is included:
“Immortal Trails Across the Blue Sea”
“Mount Pack: The Supreme Steed”
